title: descurainia subscandens
intro: Descurainia subscandens, also known as shepherd's purse, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stop bleeding and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Descurainia subscandens include its use as an antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Descurainia subscandens can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
